editorialSummary.text: Modern French plates served in a striking space with communal tables, plus a bakery and cocktail bar.

text.text: République is one of the best brunch restaurants in Los Angeles. The food, pastries, and drinks were all delicious, and the atmosphere made the celebration even more special. It can get very busy, so be sure to plan ahead and expect a line. It’s well worth the wait!

originalText.text: République is one of the best brunch restaurants in Los Angeles. The food, pastries, and drinks were all delicious, and the atmosphere made the celebration even more special. It can get very busy, so be sure to plan ahead and expect a line. It’s well worth the wait!

text.text:
While visiting Los Angeles, I had heard about this popular restaurant located in the mid-Wilshire area serving a variety of French inspired dishes and garnering high praises from visitors.

I ordered the escargot, dover sole, salmon, prawns, fries and risotto.  Although, some dishes were good the majority were disappointing and totally missed the mark.

The Salmon was lukewarm and was sent back. The Prawns were without question the biggest disappointment. By far these were the smallest prawns I've ever had anywhere and for the price one would've truly expected more.

Overall, the meal was good but not great. The service was poor and lacked structure, creating a chaotic and rushed atmosphere.

Throughout my entire dining experience and other than the times of me personally calling over my server, he was inattentive, lacked personality and never made me feel welcomed.

Although, it appeared the staff worked as a team it never seemed cohesive and what one might expect from an establishment of this caliber.

The restaurant was crowded but I did see several staffers seemingly with little to do, which is why the lack of table service surprised me.

Kudos, to the manager who did walk over and apologized for the salmon and provided me with a $50.00 gift card towards a future visit. This was very thoughtful and appreciated.

text.text:
A little disappointing for a place with a Michelin star, especially since the restaurant itself is gorgeous.

The line was long, but it moved pretty quickly. The guy serving the pastries was very nice, but unfortunately the servers at the tables were not very helpful.

I ordered a latte that was way too strong for my taste. I asked for more milk, but one server completely ignored me, and I only got help after asking again. My friend’s food also arrived about 40 minutes after the rest of ours. When we asked about it, one server ignored us again, but thankfully another staff member stepped in and finally brought the plate out.

I had the regular breakfast. The potatoes and bread were easily the highlight — both 10/10. I wasn’t a fan of how the bacon was served, and the eggs were just okay. The pastries were decent, but nothing particularly memorable.

The standout item was definitely the tres leches cake — perfectly sweet and probably the best thing we tried.

text.text:
We had an absolutely fantastic brunch here. Is it busy? Yes. Was the line long? Yes. Was the food delicious? Yes!! Don't be put off by the line. The food here is worth it, and actually the line moves relatively quickly.

For brunch, you order up front, get a number, go find a table, and they bring your food to you. Pastries are boxed when you order them, so you have those right away. They have a great selection, and every one we tried was yummy. Perfectly crisp puff pastry, balanced fillings...yum.

I had the Crocque Madame, which is a hot sandwich with house-cured ham and gruyere cheese - mmmm - all melty and delicious. The waffles are a nice serving, and come with fresh berries. Lovely. Honestly, you cannot go wrong.

The place is noisy and crowded for brunch, but I cannot wait to go back!

text.text:
Great food. Service is casual but big level. They take your order at the cashier then deliver to the table.  Food is made fresh so it takes 15-20 minutes to arrive. You can get some pastries to enjoy while you’re waiting or get some to take home.
A fun busy place to grab a bite!
